mapper.select:
SELECT ip.TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT_ID as tblInboundProductId, ip.CMPY_CD as cmpyCd, ip.AGNT_CD as agntCd, a.AGNT_NM as agntNm, ip.MTRL_CD as mtrlCd, ip.MTRL_NM as mtrlNm, ip.TBL_MTRL_M_ID as tblMtrlMId, ip.INBOUND_QUANTITY as inboundQuantity, ip.INBOUND_STATUS as inboundStatus, ip.EXPECTED_DATE as expectedDate, ip.SAVE_TIME as saveTime, ip.SAVE_USER as saveUser, ip.UPDT_TIME as updtTime, ip.UPDT_USER as updtUser, ip.ACTUAL_QUANTITY as actualQuantity, ip.ACTUAL_DATE as actualDate, ip.REMARKS as remarks, ip.COMPLETE_TIME as completeTime, ip.COMPLETE_USER as completeUser, ip.INBOUND_QUANTITY as inboundQuantity a.BARCODE as barcode FROM TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT ip LEFT JOIN TBL_AGENCY_M a ON ip.AGNT_CD = a.AGNT_CD AND ip.CMPY_CD = a.CMPY_CD WHERE 1=1 AND ip.INBOUND_STATUS = 'PENDING' AND (ip.DELETED_YN IS NULL OR ip.DELETED_YN = 'N')
AND ip.CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd}
AND ip.MTRL_CD IN ( SELECT MTRL_CD FROM TBL_MTRL_M WHERE CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} AND BARCODE = #{barcode} )
ORDER BY ip.EXPECTED_DATE ASC, ip.SAVE_TIME ASC OFFSET (#{pageNum} - 1) * #{pageSize} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY
mapper.update:
UPDATE dbo.TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT SET /* 기존 수량에 이번 검수 수량을 누적 합산 */ ACTUAL_QUANTITY = ISNULL(ACTUAL_QUANTITY, 0) + #{actualQuantity}, FAIL_QTY = ISNULL(FAIL_QTY, 0) + #{failQty},
ACTUAL_DATE = CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), GETDATE(), 120),
/* (기존 합격+기존 불량 + 이번 합격+이번 불량) >= 예정수량 일 때만 완료 */ INBOUND_STATUS = CASE WHEN (ISNULL(ACTUAL_QUANTITY, 0) + #{actualQuantity} + ISNULL(FAIL_QTY, 0) + #{failQty}) >= INBOUND_QUANTITY THEN 'COMPLETED' ELSE INBOUND_STATUS END,
COMPLETE_TIME = CASE WHEN (ISNULL(ACTUAL_QUANTITY, 0) + #{actualQuantity} + ISNULL(FAIL_QTY, 0) + #{failQty}) >= INBOUND_QUANTITY THEN GETDATE() ELSE COMPLETE_TIME END, COMPLETE_USER = CASE WHEN (ISNULL(ACTUAL_QUANTITY, 0) + #{actualQuantity} + ISNULL(FAIL_QTY, 0) + #{failQty}) >= INBOUND_QUANTITY THEN #{completeUser} ELSE COMPLETE_USER END, UPDT_TIME = GETDATE(), UPDT_USER = #{completeUser} WHERE TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT_ID = #{tblInboundProductId} AND CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} AND DELETED_YN = 'N'

UPDATE [dbo].[TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT] SET /* 기존 합격/불량 수량에 이번 입력값을 더함 */ ACTUAL_QUANTITY = ISNULL(ACTUAL_QUANTITY, 0) + #{actualQuantity}, FAIL_QTY = ISNULL(FAIL_QTY, 0) + #{failQty},
ACTUAL_DATE = CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), GETDATE(), 120),
/* (기존 합계 + 이번 입력 합계) >= 예정수량이면 COMPLETE로 변경 */ INBOUND_STATUS = CASE WHEN (ISNULL(ACTUAL_QUANTITY, 0) + #{actualQuantity} + ISNULL(FAIL_QTY, 0) + #{failQty}) >= INBOUND_QUANTITY THEN 'COMPLETED' ELSE INBOUND_STATUS END,
COMPLETE_TIME = CASE WHEN (ISNULL(ACTUAL_QUANTITY, 0) + #{actualQuantity} + ISNULL(FAIL_QTY, 0) + #{failQty}) >= INBOUND_QUANTITY THEN GETDATE() ELSE COMPLETE_TIME END, COMPLETE_USER = CASE WHEN (ISNULL(ACTUAL_QUANTITY, 0) + #{actualQuantity} + ISNULL(FAIL_QTY, 0) + #{failQty}) >= INBOUND_QUANTITY THEN #{completeUser} ELSE COMPLETE_USER END, UPDT_TIME = GETDATE(), UPDT_USER = #{completeUser} WHERE TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT_ID = #{tblInboundProductId} AND CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} AND DELETED_YN = 'N' AND INBOUND_STATUS != 'COMPLETED' /* 이미 완료된 건은 중복 방지 */
mapper.select: SELECT TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT_ID as tblInboundProductId, INBOUND_STATUS as inboundStatus, INBOUND_QUANTITY as inboundQuantity, ISNULL(ACTUAL_QUANTITY, 0) as actualQuantity, ISNULL(FAIL_QTY, 0) as failQty FROM [dbo].[TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT] WHERE TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT_ID = #{tblInboundProductId}

SELECT ip.TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT_ID AS tblInboundProductId, ip.CMPY_CD AS cmpyCd, ip.AGNT_CD AS agntCd, am.AGNT_NM AS agntNm, ip.MTRL_CD AS mtrlCd, ip.MTRL_NM AS mtrlNm, ip.TBL_MTRL_M_ID AS tblMtrlMId FROM dbo.TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT ip LEFT JOIN dbo.TBL_AGENCY_M am ON am.CMPY_CD = ip.CMPY_CD AND am.AGNT_CD = ip.AGNT_CD WHERE ip.TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT_ID = #{tblInboundProductId} AND ip.CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} AND ip.DELETED_YN = 'N'

update.foreach:
-- TBL_MTRL_M의 CURRENT_QUANTITY 업데이트 (MTO가 아닌 상품만) UPDATE dbo.TBL_MTRL_M SET YONGIN_CURRENT_QUANTITY = ISNULL(YONGIN_CURRENT_QUANTITY, 0) + #{item.actualQuantity}, CURRENT_QUANTITY = ISNULL(CURRENT_QUANTITY, 0) + #{item.actualQuantity}, UPDT_TIME = GETDATE(), UPDT_USER = #{item.completeUser} WHERE CMPY_CD = #{item.cmpyCd} AND AGNT_CD = #{item.agntCd} AND MTRL_CD = #{item.mtrlCd} AND MTO_YN = 'N' -- MTO가 아닌 상품만 재고 관리
-- 재고 변동 이력 기록 INSERT INTO dbo.TBL_INV_ADJUSTMENT ( CMPY_CD, AGNT_CD, AGNT_NM, TBL_MTRL_M_ID, MTRL_CD, MTRL_NM, ADJUSTMENT_TYPE, BEFORE_QTY, ADJUSTMENT_QTY, AFTER_QTY, ADJUSTMENT_REASON, ADJUSTMENT_DATE, SAVE_TIME, SAVE_USER, UPDT_TIME, UPDT_USER, DELETED_YN ) SELECT #{item.cmpyCd}, #{item.agntCd}, (SELECT AGNT_NM FROM dbo.TBL_AGENCY_M WHERE AGNT_CD = #{item.agntCd} AND CMPY_CD = #{item.cmpyCd}), TBL_MTRL_M_ID, #{item.mtrlCd}, #{item.mtrlNm}, 'INBOUND', ISNULL(CURRENT_QUANTITY, 0) - #{item.actualQuantity}, #{item.actualQuantity}, ISNULL(CURRENT_QUANTITY, 0), '입고완료-자동증가', ISNULL(#{item.actualDate, jdbcType=DATE}, GETDATE()), GETDATE(), #{item.completeUser}, GETDATE(), #{item.completeUser}, 'N' FROM dbo.TBL_MTRL_M WHERE CMPY_CD = #{item.cmpyCd} AND AGNT_CD = #{item.agntCd} AND MTRL_CD = #{item.mtrlCd} AND MTO_YN = 'N'

mapper.select:
SELECT ip.TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT_ID AS tblInboundProductId, ip.CMPY_CD AS cmpyCd, ip.AGNT_CD AS agntCd, a.AGNT_NM AS agntNm, ISNULL(m.BARCODE,m.TBL_MTRL_M_ID) AS barcode, ip.MTRL_CD AS mtrlCd, ip.MTRL_NM AS mtrlNm, ip.TBL_MTRL_M_ID AS tblMtrlMId, m.FIXED_LOC_CD AS fixedLocId, m.FIXED_LOC_CD AS fixedLocNm, ip.INBOUND_QUANTITY AS inboundQuantity, ip.ACTUAL_QUANTITY AS actualQuantity, ISNULL(ph.TOTAL_PUT_QTY, 0) AS totalPutawayQty, (ip.ACTUAL_QUANTITY - ISNULL(ph.TOTAL_PUT_QTY, 0)) AS remainingQty, CONVERT(varchar(10), ip.ACTUAL_DATE, 23) AS actualDate, CONVERT(varchar(19), ip.COMPLETE_TIME, 120) AS completeTime, ip.COMPLETE_USER AS completeUser, ip.REMARKS AS remarks FROM dbo.TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT ip LEFT JOIN dbo.TBL_AGENCY_M a ON a.CMPY_CD = ip.CMPY_CD AND a.AGNT_CD = ip.AGNT_CD -- [수정] AGNT_CD 조건을 추가하여 화주별 상품을 정확히 매칭 LEFT JOIN dbo.TBL_MTRL_M m ON m.CMPY_CD = ip.CMPY_CD AND m.AGNT_CD = ip.AGNT_CD -- 이 조건이 누락되면 데이터가 늘어날 수 있습니다. AND m.MTRL_CD = ip.MTRL_CD LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT_ID, SUM(PUTAWAY_QTY) AS TOTAL_PUT_QTY FROM dbo.TBL_WH_PUT_H GROUP BY TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT_ID ) ph ON ip.TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT_ID = ph.TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT_ID WHERE ip.INBOUND_STATUS = 'COMPLETED' AND (ip.DELETED_YN IS NULL OR ip.DELETED_YN = 'N') AND (ip.ACTUAL_QUANTITY - ISNULL(ph.TOTAL_PUT_QTY, 0)) > 0
AND ip.CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd}
AND COMPLETE_TIME >= CAST(#{date} AS date)
ORDER BY ip.COMPLETE_TIME DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dbo.TBL_WH_PUT_H ( CMPY_CD, WH_CD, TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT_ID, ZONE_ID, LOC_ID, PUTAWAY_QTY, LOT_NO, EXPIRE_DATE, PUTAWAY_TIME, PUTAWAY_USER, REMARKS, DELETED_YN ) VALUES ( #{cmpyCd}, #{whCd}, #{tblInboundProductId}, #{zoneId}, #{locId}, #{putawayQty}, #{lotNo}, #{expireDate, jdbcType=DATE}, GETDATE(), #{putawayUser}, #{remarks}, 'N' )
mapper.select: SELECT ZONE_ID AS zoneId, LOC_ID AS locId, LOC_CD AS locCd, WH_CD AS whCd FROM TBL_WH_LOC_M WHERE CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} AND LOC_CD = #{locBarcode} AND DELETED_YN = 'N'

SELECT TOP 1 l.LOC_ID AS locId, l.WH_CD AS whCd, l.LOC_CD AS locCd, l.LOC_NM AS locNm FROM dbo.TBL_WH_LOC_M l WHERE l.CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} AND l.ZONE_ID = #{zoneId} AND l.USE_YN = 'Y' AND l.DELETED_YN = 'N' ORDER BY l.LOC_ID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PRINT_QUEUE (AGNT_NM, MTRL_NM, MTRL_CD, BARCODE, QTY, STATUS, REQ_DT) VALUES (#{agntNm}, #{mtrlNm}, #{mtrlCd}, #{barcode}, 1, '0', GETDATE())

INSERT INTO TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT ( CMPY_CD, AGNT_CD, MTRL_CD, MTRL_NM, TBL_MTRL_M_ID, INBOUND_QUANTITY, INBOUND_STATUS, EXPECTED_DATE, SAVE_TIME, SAVE_USER, REMARKS, DELETED_YN, PUTAWAY_YN ) VALUES ( #{cmpyCd}, #{agntCd}, #{mtrlCd}, #{mtrlNm}, #{tblMtrlMId}, #{inboundQuantity}, ISNULL(#{inboundStatus}, 'PENDING'), #{expectedDate}, GETDATE(), #{saveUser}, #{remarks}, 'N', 'N' )

INSERT INTO [dbo].[TBL_INBOUND_MASTER] ( CMPY_CD, AGNT_CD, VHCL_TON_TYPE, IN_METHOD, PALLET_QTY, ACTUAL_DATE, SAVE_TIME, SAVE_USER ) VALUES ( #{cmpyCd}, #{agntCd}, #{vhclTonType}, #{inMethod}, #{palletQty}, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), GETDATE(), 120), GETDATE(), #{saveUser} )
mapper.select: SELECT TBL_INBOUND_MASTER_ID, VHCL_TON_TYPE, IN_METHOD, PALLET_QTY, SAVE_TIME FROM [dbo].[TBL_INBOUND_MASTER] WHERE CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} AND AGNT_CD = #{agntCd} AND ACTUAL_DATE = #{actualDate} ORDER BY SAVE_TIME DESC

SELECT ip.TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT_ID AS tblInboundProductId, ip.CMPY_CD AS cmpyCd, ip.AGNT_CD AS agntCd, a.AGNT_NM AS agntNm, ip.MTRL_CD AS mtrlCd, ip.MTRL_NM AS mtrlNm, ip.TBL_MTRL_M_ID AS tblMtrlMId, ip.INBOUND_QUANTITY AS inboundQuantity, ip.ACTUAL_QUANTITY AS actualQuantity, ISNULL(ph.TOTAL_PUT_QTY, 0) AS totalPutawayQty, /* 검수수량에서 적치수량을 뺀 정확한 잔량 계산 */ (ISNULL(ip.ACTUAL_QUANTITY, 0) - ISNULL(ph.TOTAL_PUT_QTY, 0)) AS remainingQty, ISNULL(m.BARCODE,m.TBL_MTRL_M_ID) AS barcode FROM dbo.TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT ip INNER JOIN dbo.TBL_MTRL_M m ON ip.TBL_MTRL_M_ID = m.TBL_MTRL_M_ID LEFT JOIN dbo.TBL_AGENCY_M a ON a.CMPY_CD = ip.CMPY_CD AND a.AGNT_CD = ip.AGNT_CD LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT_ID, SUM(ISNULL(PUTAWAY_QTY, 0)) AS TOTAL_PUT_QTY FROM dbo.TBL_WH_PUT_H WHERE (DELETED_YN IS NULL OR DELETED_YN = 'N') /* 삭제된 적치 데이터 제외 */ /* 폐기존(예: ZONE_ID가 폐기존 ID인 경우) 적치 내역은 제외 로직 추가 필요 */ AND ZONE_ID != (SELECT ZONE_ID FROM TBL_WH_ZONE_M WHERE ZONE_NM LIKE '%폐기%') GROUP BY TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT_ID ) ph ON ip.TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT_ID = ph.TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT_ID WHERE ip.INBOUND_STATUS = 'COMPLETED' AND (ip.DELETED_YN IS NULL OR ip.DELETED_YN = 'N') AND ISNULL(m.BARCODE,m.TBL_MTRL_M_ID) = #{barcode} AND ip.CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} /* [수정] 수량이 0인 것도 조회하여 프론트에서 처리할 수 있게 함 */ AND (ISNULL(ip.ACTUAL_QUANTITY, 0) - ISNULL(ph.TOTAL_PUT_QTY, 0)) >= 0 ORDER BY (ISNULL(ip.ACTUAL_QUANTITY, 0) - ISNULL(ph.TOTAL_PUT_QTY, 0)) DESC, ip.COMPLETE_TIME ASC

SELECT M.FIXED_LOC_CD AS locCd, L.LOC_ID AS locId, L.ZONE_ID AS zoneId, L.WH_CD AS whCd FROM TBL_MTRL_M M INNER JOIN TBL_WH_LOC_M L ON M.FIXED_LOC_CD = L.LOC_CD AND M.CMPY_CD = L.CMPY_CD WHERE M.MTRL_CD = #{mtrlCd} AND M.CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd}
SELECT TOP 1 L.LOC_CD AS locCd, L.LOC_ID AS locId, L.WH_CD AS whCd, L.ZONE_ID AS zoneId FROM TBL_WH_LOC_M L WHERE L.LOC_NM LIKE '%폐기존%' AND L.CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd}
